query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE roles LIKE '%teacher%' AND deletedAt IS NULL) as users_with_teacher_role,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM teachers) as teachers_table_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT userId) FROM teachers) as unique_userId_in_teachers,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT userId FROM teachers GROUP BY userId HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) AS temp) as duplicate_userId_count;

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE roles LIKE '%teacher%' AND deletedAt IS NULL) as users_with_teacher_role,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM teachers) as teachers_table_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT userId) FROM teachers) as unique_userId_in_teachers,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT userId FROM teachers GROUP BY userId HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) AS temp) as duplicate_userId_count;
